news.title: The SAVE America Act isn't worth ending the Senate filibuster
news.description: President Trump is pushing to end the Senate filibuster in order to pass the SAVE America Act, but there is no evidence to support his claims of voter fraud and the filibuster serves as an important check on the majority party's ability to pass legislation.
